step_1_scanned_metadata.narrative_summary: Virginia Horton, at age 16, was gathering eggs in a barn when she suddenly found herself outside with a painless, deep cut on her leg. Under hypnosis, she recalled being carried into a round, domed room by a being. Inside, she lay on a couch while humanoid beings with large crania, large eyes, no hair, and slender limbs, wearing gray suits, remained in a separate room. She communicated telepathically with a friendly, grandfatherly being who discussed animals, human life spans, and his travels, showing her star maps. He mentioned she would not remember him but he could always find her and might take her to his world later. He requested permission to take a "piece of her" (blood sample), which was then painlessly taken from her leg by a tubular arm.

encounter_events.source_citation: witness went into the barn to gather eggs one afternoon, then suddenly found herself in the yard
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experienced a time lapse: she went into the barn and then suddenly found herself in the yard with no memory of the intervening period.
